title: Gethsemane #1068
definition:
Gethsemane = "an oil press"

 1) the name of a place at the foot of the Mount of Olives,
    beyond the torrent Kidron
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gethsemane = "an oil press"

 1) the name of a place at the foot of the Mount of Olives,
    beyond the torrent Kidron

    NASB:  Gethsemane, an olive orchard on the Mt. of Olives:
